summary: Implemented the base generated homepage structure. Created the site generation orchestrator (generate-site.ts) that deterministically selects an era, compatible archetype, compatible region, theme, and metadata from a seed. Created the render layer: apply-theme.ts sets CSS custom properties on the container, render-header.ts builds a header with site name and localized nav links, render-hero.ts builds a hero section with tagline/summary/CTA, render-footer.ts builds a footer with copyright/status/era flavor text, and render-homepage.ts orchestrates all renderers. Added generated-site.css with responsive styles consuming CSS variables. Wired everything into main.ts. All 382 tests pass (55 new), typecheck clean, lint clean.
